dimensions.name: Instant
dimensions.basis: Batch analysis in seconds; real-time is not the use case. LLM timeouts make latency bounded.

dimensions.name: Natural
dimensions.basis: Judge pinned to gpt-4.1 (reads JDs correctly) + typed input contracts. Capped by missing per-skill ontology descriptions.

dimensions.name: Permitted
dimensions.basis: Calibrated deterministic judge gate in the prod path (shadow) + regeneration fallback. -> 5 on the enforce flip.

dimensions.name: Adaptive
dimensions.basis: Pinned + calibrated, drift guard + recalibration trigger, ensemble fixes the temp-0 variance, self-correcting regeneration. -> 6 with an outcome-feedback loop.

dimensions.name: Contextual
dimensions.basis: Verdict variance fixed; RAG no-op now observable (not silent). -> 5 when GCP credentials make retrieval real.

dimensions.name: Transparent
dimensions.basis: Structured JSON logs + correlation IDs + per-call telemetry + /metrics + /health + the TBI dashboard, now with metrics PERSISTED to the DB and rendered as trends (survive restarts).

layers.note: Ontology + DB. RAG vector store pending GCP credentials.
LLM timeout + retry/backoff wrapper on every external call.
RAG retrieval is a no-op until GCP ADC; visible at /health.
Judge pinned to gpt-4.1; specialized agents.
Deterministic gate (shadow) + ensemble + regeneration + golden/drift guard.
